keyQuestions.q: Can the 6-rung ladder gate sk-code Phase 1 without breaking surface-router precedence?
keyQuestions.answer: Yes — attach at 0->1 transition, after surface+intent routing, gated to intent=IMPLEMENTATION; ~15-line subsection in the always-loaded universal doc.

keyQuestions.q: Which ponytail hook points map onto sk-code's hook surface?
keyQuestions.answer: SessionStart surface-priming + UserPromptSubmit standards-injection are additive (ADOPT-LATER, 3-runtime cost); avoid a repo-visible flag file.

keyQuestions.q: Should sk-code gain a verification-intensity / review-depth slider?
keyQuestions.answer: No — DO-NOT-ADOPT; redundant with existing tiers/floors, lite rung is a safety regression. Only graft = SK_CODE_REVIEW_DEPTH env alias over existing ON_DEMAND tier.

keyQuestions.q: Do // ponytail: ceiling comments pass comment-hygiene; can they cut review false positives?
keyQuestions.answer: Content is durable WHY (allowed); use neutral 'ceiling:' not the brand; do NOT add to ALLOWED_PATTERNS (bypass risk). Use as P2-downgrade evidence only.

keyQuestions.q: Could a canary-phrase guard protect refs + 3-runtime mirrors?
keyQuestions.answer: Yes — net-new (guards WORDING vs router-sync PATHS). Top target = Review status triplet (per-file scoped). Iron Law already drifted 3 ways -> canonicalize first. Wire as script+workflow, not vitest.

keyQuestions.q: Could sk-code adopt an objective simplicity benchmark?
keyQuestions.answer: No standalone clone; fold code_loc + over-engineering markers into deep-improvement Lane B sweep (already correctness-gated, which ponytail lacks). ADOPT-LATER.

keyQuestions.q: How map ship-then-question + YAGNI onto sk-code-review severity?
keyQuestions.answer: No new findingClass/severity. Add needed-ness KISS prompt wired to removal (P2/P1-if-risk) + implementer anti-stall rule in sk-code reconciled with SCOPE-LOCK.

keyQuestions.q: Which ponytail-review checks merge into sk-code-review?
keyQuestions.answer: Merge not standalone. Add stdlib/native rows (real gap) + shrink (ADOPT-LATER) to code_quality_checklist; Replacement field to removal_plan. Reject net:-N gate; over-engineering stays P2.

keyQuestions.q: What can be borrowed from ponytail's portability model?
keyQuestions.answer: Repo already has the analog (mirror-sync-verify.cjs) but mis-scoped to promotion-time; promote to repo-wide gate; add verify_stack_folders.py. Skills need no per-host adapter (live once, Read by all) — only agents do. Reject byte-equality/always-on-injection/9-host fanout.

keyQuestions.q: Portable vs incompatible; ranked recommendations + conflicts?
keyQuestions.answer: Ladder gates Phase1, Iron Law verifies Phase3 (complementary). 25 recs ranked ADOPT-NOW(8)/ADOPT-LATER(9)/DO-NOT-ADOPT(8). Best = Phase-1 ladder (highest-value, but highest-RISK in ADOPT-NOW per R2). Most overrated = intensity slider.

round2Corrections: Canary scope: pr_state_dedup.md carries only the COMMENTED skip suffix, not the full triplet — canary per-file invariant strings.
Design Restraint Ladder is highest-VALUE but the highest-RISK ADOPT-NOW item (not 'lowest-risk'); ship additive doc rows first, prove ladder integration in the plan packet.
